summary: Tested 3 new features for Graupner Suite iteration 20: 1) Einsatz-Dialog wider (max-w-3xl, 2-column layout), 2) Reparaturgruppen multi-select chips (max 3) in both Einsatz and Anfragen, 3) Termintext with Vorlagen visible on right side. All 15 backend tests pass. All frontend UI features verified.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/einsaetze - accepts reparaturgruppen as array
Backend: GET /api/einsaetze/{id} - returns reparaturgruppen as array
Backend: PUT /api/einsaetze/{id} - updates reparaturgruppen array
Backend: GET /api/einsaetze - returns reparaturgruppen field in list
Backend: DELETE /api/einsaetze/{id} - cleanup works
Backend: GET /api/anfragen - returns reparaturgruppen field
Backend: PUT /api/anfragen/{id} - accepts reparaturgruppen as array
Backend: Verify anfrage reparaturgruppen persisted
Backend: GET /api/einsatz-config - returns reparaturgruppen list
Backend: PUT /api/einsatz-config - updates reparaturgruppen list
Backend: Create einsatz with empty reparaturgruppen array
Backend: Create einsatz with single reparaturgruppe in array
Backend: Create einsatz with termin_text field
Backend: Update einsatz termin_text
Frontend: Einsatz dialog is 768px wide (max-w-3xl applied)
Frontend: Einsatz dialog has 2-column grid layout
Frontend: Reparaturgruppen multi-select chips (11 chips available)
Frontend: Chips turn orange when selected
Frontend: Max 3 chips can be selected (4th chip disabled)
Frontend: '3 ausgewählt' count shown
Frontend: Termintext textarea visible on right column
Frontend: 'Vorlage einfügen' with template buttons visible
Frontend: Anfragen edit modal has Reparaturgruppen multi-select
Frontend: Anfragen modal shows '(mehrfach auswählbar)' label
Frontend: Anfragen save updates reparaturgruppen array
Frontend: Anfragen expanded card shows REPARATURGRUPPEN section with multiple badges
Frontend: Einsatz cards display multiple reparaturgruppen badges
Frontend: Einsatz expanded view shows 'Reparaturgruppen:' with comma-separated list
seed_data_creation: Created test Einsatz with 3 reparaturgruppen for UI verification (cleaned up after test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features fully implemented and tested: 1) Einsatz dialog now 768px wide with 2-column layout (left: form fields including multi-select reparaturgruppen chips, right: Beschreibung, Termin, Termintext with Vorlage buttons). 2) Reparaturgruppen changed from single-select string to multi-select array (max 3) in both Einsatz and Anfragen. 3) Backend field renamed from 'reparaturgruppe' (string) to 'reparaturgruppen' (List[str]). Frontend handles backward compatibility by checking both fields: (e.reparaturgruppen || (e.reparaturgruppe ? [e.reparaturgruppe] : [])). Existing data with old 'reparaturgruppe' string field displays correctly.
